features.name: Bonus Cantrip
features.description: Learn one additional druid cantrip of your choice.

features.name: Natural Recovery
features.description: Regain some magical energy by sitting in meditation or communing with nature during a short rest. The amount of spell slots you recover is equal to half your druid level (rounded up), but no slot can be higher than 6th level. You can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

features.name: Circle Spells
features.description: Gain access to certain circle spells at the given levels. The specific spells are determined by your chosen Circle of Land (Arctic, Coast, Grassland, Mountain, Forest, Desert, Swamp, or Underdark).
